3022730.name: My Recycling Center - Resources Trading Expansion
3022730.description:
Convert trash into valuable resources by using the new recycling machines. Store away the finished pallets with the forklift and sell them at the commodities exchange when prices are up.

  • Use four new recycling machines: Plastics granulator, compost machine, paper compactor and wood shredder
  • Create valuable resources: Wood chips, plastics granules, compost and mixed paper bales
  • Two authentic forklift truck models with first-person view, new sounds and custom colors
  • Storage area with upgradeable shelves to store all pallets until you are ready to sell them
  • Commodities exchange with authentic online-based prices, bonus payments and more
3022730.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
